description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsBeige sandal with a toe holder and two forefoot straps (with shimmer detail at the periphery)Has an elasticated ankle loop and a soft brown footbedTough TPR outsole  with an upraised heel and horizontal grooves all overMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
